name: dunkin_good_will_dunkin
description: 5x median engagement. Ben Affleck, Jennifer Aniston, Tom Brady, Jason Alexander. 90s sitcom parody.
caption:
Dunkin' - Good Will Dunkin' (Super Bowl Commercial 2026)

Dunkin's 2026 Super Bowl commercial, "Good Will Dunkin'," is a 60-second star-studded spot featuring Ben Affleck as a "Good Will Hunting" style math genius working at a Dunkin'. The ad features TV sitcom icons Jennifer Aniston, Matt LeBlanc, Jason Alexander, Jaleel White, Alfonso Ribeiro, Jasmine Guy, and a cameo by Tom Brady.

Credits:
- Client/Brand: Dunkin'
- Agency: Dunkin' Donuts
- Key Talent: Ben Affleck, Jennifer Aniston, Matt LeBl
